flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sauk Valley Community College rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.6k → $8.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sauk Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
